name: designos
description: Design intelligence OS for AI coding agents: 24 component modules, 24 industry packs, 13 UX patterns, 10 foundations (type/color/spacing/tokens/a11y), 8 psychology modules, motion system, 9 review agents — plus a deterministic review gate (designos review/audit/visual) with WCAG-computing validators and an honest eval protocol with committed runs. Use when designing, building, reviewing, or scoring UI: landing pages, dashboards, pricing, forms, docs, native apps, color, typography, layout, accessibility, motion.
